name: current-anthropology-skills
description: An opinionated agent skill stack for manuscripts targeted at Current Anthropology (CA), the transnational all-subfields journal whose Major Articles receive the CA✩ comment-and-reply Treatment, published by the University of Chicago Press for the Wenner-Gren Foundation.

plugins.name: current-anthropology-skills
plugins.description: Twelve-skill bundle covering the Current Anthropology (CA) manuscript lifecycle across all subfields, with ethnographic/qualitative inference as first-class, research ethics and accountability at the center, and the distinctive CA✩ comment-and-reply Treatment encoded into review and rebuttal.
